---
title: "Biostat Final Project"
subtitle: "Due Mar 18 @ 11:59PM"
author: "Charlotte Lee and 206782165"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
    number-sections: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: left
    code-fold: false
---

## Load Libraries

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
library(bigrquery)
library(dbplyr)
library(DBI)
library(gt)
library(gtsummary)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Running Code

```{r}
con_bq <- dbConnect(
    bigrquery::bigquery(),
    project = "biostat-203b-2025-winter",
    dataset = "mimiciv_3_1",
    billing = "biostat-203b-2025-winter"
)
con_bq
bq_auth(path = "biostat-203b-2026-winter-92fefbfab477.json")
```

## Tables

```{r}

```
